name: io.github.repairxpert/indautomation
title: RepairXpert Equipment Diagnostics (Industrial + Automotive OBD-II)
description: Two MCP servers in one repo: (1) industrial fault diagnosis with 313 codes across Allen-Bradley PLCs, VFDs, conveyors, AS/RS, packaging, pilers, palletizers, and CR30 relays; (2) the first automotive OBD-II MCP server — read/clear DTCs, live PIDs, freeze frames, and expert diagnosis for 106 automotive trouble codes. OBD works in mock mode (no hardware) or real mode via ELM327 adapter.
